news.headline: Key Tronic Corp (Nasdaq: KTCC) will report Q1 fiscal 2025 results on Nov 5, 2024, after market close.
news.summary: In Spokane Valley, Washington, Key Tronic Corporation (Nasdaq: KTCC) revealed its intention to disclose its fiscal 2025 first-quarter results on November 5, 2024, after the market closes. The report will provide insights into the company’s performance for the upcoming period.

news.headline: Carlisle Companies reports Q3 2024 results - Record EPS of $5.30, adj. EPS of $5.78 (+24% YoY), Revenue $1.3B (+6% YoY), Operating margin 23.7%, CCM revenue up 9%. Resi. market headwinds impact CWT.
news.summary: Carlisle Companies Incorporated (NYSE: CSL) reported its financial results for the third quarter of 2024 in Scottsdale, Arizona. The company achieved a record third quarter diluted EPS of $5.30 and adjusted EPS of $5.78, marking a 24% increase year-over-year. Revenue for the quarter reached $1.3 billion, up 6% compared to the previous year. The operating margin stood at 23.7%, with a Q3 record adjusted EBITDA margin of 27.6%, representing a 60 basis point increase year-over-year. Carlisle Construction Materials (CCM) experienced a 9% revenue growth and expanded its adjusted EBITDA margin by 110 basis points to a Q3 record of 32.8%. However, the company faced challenges in residential markets affecting Carlisle WorkTech (CWT).

news.headline: Comfort Systems USA (NYSE: FIX) reports Q3 2024 results: Net income $146.2M, revenue $1.81B, operating cash flow $302.2M.
news.summary: Comfort Systems USA, Inc. announced its quarterly results for the period ending on September 30, 2024. The net income for this quarter was $146.2 million, translating to $4.09 per diluted share. This is an increase from the previous year's $105.1 million, or $2.93 per diluted share for the same period. The revenue for the third quarter of 2024 saw a significant rise to $1.81 billion, compared to $1.38 billion in 2023. Additionally, the Company reported operating cash flow of $302.2 million during this quarter.

news.headline: Boxlight Corporation to hold Q3 2024 earnings call on Nov 13, 2024 at 4:30pm ET, with dial-in numbers: 1-888-506-0062 (Domestic) & 1-973-528-0011 (International).
news.summary: Boxlight Corporation (Nasdaq: BOXL), a prominent interactive technology solutions provider, has scheduled its Third Quarter 2024 earnings conference call for Wednesday, November 13, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. ET. Interested parties can join the conference by dialing 1-888-506-0062 (Domestic) or 1-973-528-0011 (International) with the participant access code 971820. The call will also be accessible via webcast at the provided link. The event is set to take place at 1:30 p.m. PT.

news.headline: Everseen promotes AI technology to combat retail theft on Fight Retail Crime Day, highlighting strategies used by shoplifters. Retail crime costs billions annually. Organized retail crime and opportunistic theft pose growing challenges for retailers.
news.summary: In Cork, Ireland and Miami, Everseen, a prominent vision AI company, is combatting theft through advanced AI technology. In honor of Fight Retail Crime Day, the company sheds light on the unconventional tactics employed by shoplifters. Despite the whimsical names associated with these methods, their effect on retailers is substantial, contributing to billions in losses each year. The retail industry is under increasing strain due to rising instances of organized retail crime and opportunistic theft, posing significant risks to their profitability.

news.headline: Chadwick-BaRoss showcases Ponsse Scorpion Giant at demo event in Maine, attended by logging contractors and operators from New England.
news.summary: In Osborn, Maine on October 24, 2024, logging contractors and forestry operators from various parts of New England convened for a special demonstration organized by Chadwick-BaRoss. This event unveiled the much-awaited 'Scorpion Giant' in the forests of Maine, marking its public debut to an audience of interested professionals.

news.headline: Business First Bancshares, Inc. announced Q3 2024 results with net income of $16.5 million and core net income of $17.2 million.
news.summary: Business First Bancshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: BFST) based in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, reported its unaudited financial results for the quarter ended September 30, 2024. The company, which owns b1BANK, disclosed a net income available to common shareholders of $16.5 million, translating to $0.65 per diluted common share. These figures represent an increase of $0.6 million and $0.03, respectively, compared to the prior quarter ended June 30, 2024. Excluding specific income and expenses, the core net income for the same quarter was $17.2 million, equivalent to $0.68 per diluted common share. This marks a $1.0 million and $0.04 increase from the linked quarter earlier.

news.headline: Barrick Gold denies Mali govt's claims of breaching commitments for fairer mineral exploitation, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: In Toronto on October 24, 2024, Barrick Gold Corporation (NYSE:GOLD)(TSX:ABX) responded to allegations from the Malian Ministry of Mines and the Finance Ministry, refuting claims that it had not fulfilled its obligations outlined in an agreement aimed at ensuring a fairer distribution of mineral resources among involved parties.

news.headline: Mirion to hold Investor Day on Dec 3, 2024 at 2pm ET at NYSE, webcast live. Limited in-person capacity by invite only. Contact ir@mirio.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Mirion, a prominent supplier of radiation safety solutions for nuclear power and cancer treatment, is set to conduct an Investor Day on December 3, 2024, starting at 2:00 p.m. ET. The event, scheduled at the New York Stock Exchange, will also be streamed online. Limited seating is available, and in-person participation requires an invitation. Institutional investors and financial analysts keen on attending in person can reach out to ir@mirio. Mirion's stock is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol MIR.

news.headline: Farmer Brothers Coffee (NASDAQ: FARM) to announce fiscal Q1 2025 results for the period ending Sept. 30, 2024.
news.summary: Farmer Brothers Coffee, listed on NASDAQ as FARM, is set to release its financial results for the fiscal first quarter of 2025, covering the period up to September 30, 2024. Investors and stakeholders can anticipate important insights into the company's performance and revenue figures during this period.

news.headline: CTO Realty Growth reports Q3 2024 operating results and earnings; quarter ended on September 30, 2024. Symbol: CTO.
news.summary: Winter Park, Florida - On October 24, 2024, CTO Realty Growth, Inc. announced its financial performance for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024. The company, traded on the NYSE under the symbol CTO, revealed its operating results and earnings for the mentioned period.

news.headline: Mohawk Industries Q3 2024 report: net sales $2.7B, net earnings $162M, EPS $2.55. Adjusted net earnings $184M, adjusted EPS $2.90. Prior-year net sales $2.8B, net loss $760M, loss per share $11.94. Earnings impacted by non-cash impairment charges in Q3 2023.
news.summary: In Calhoun, Georgia on October 24, 2024, Mohawk Industries, Inc. (NYSE: MHK) released their third quarter financial results for 2024. The company reported net earnings of $162 million and earnings per share of $2.55. Adjusted net earnings were $184 million, with adjusted EPS at $2.90. Net sales for the third quarter of 2024 totaled $2.7 billion, showing a 1.7% decrease as reported and a 2.1% decrease on an adjusted basis compared to the previous year. In the third quarter of 2023, Mohawk Industries reported net sales of $2.8 billion, with a net loss of $760 million and a loss per share of $11.94. Adjusted net earnings for the same period were $174 million, with an adjusted EPS of $2.72. The substantial loss in the prior year was mainly due to non-cash impairment charges amounting to $876 million incurred in the third quarter of 2023.

news.headline: Kuke Music Holding Limited receives NYSE non-compliance notices due to market capitalization and stock price.
news.summary: Kuke Music Holding Limited, a prominent classical music service platform in China, has recently faced challenges with its listing on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE). On September 24, 2024, the NYSE informed Kuke that it did not meet the continued listing standards, citing a market capitalization below $50 million over a 30-day period, with shareholders' equity also falling below $50 million. The company's market capitalization as of September 23, 2024, averaged around $47 million, while its reported shareholders' equity as of December 31, 2023, was roughly $3.3 million. Later, on October 8, 2024, Kuke Music received another notice from the NYSE regarding non-compliance with the $1.00 average closing price standard, reporting an average closing price of approximately $0.98 for its American Depositary Shares (ADSs) as of October 7, 2024.

news.headline: New index by ACLI measures financial resilience of middle-class households. Q2 saw improvements despite wage growth deceleration.
news.summary: In the second quarter of 2024, there were positive developments noted as inflation and cost pressures showed signs of easing, despite a slowdown in wage growth. An index introduced by the American Council of Life Insurers indicated an improvement in middle-class households' capacity to handle financial responsibilities. This data was made public on October 24, 2024.

news.headline: TCL partners with Call of Duty for Black Ops 6; bringing 240 VRR gaming and advanced features to their home theater.
news.summary: A prominent electronics company has introduced 240 VRR gaming and a variety of advanced features to its acclaimed home theater collection. Based in Irvine, California, TCL®, a top-selling electronics brand, is marking its sixth year of collaboration.

news.headline: Knowles (NYSE: KN) reports Q3 2024 financial results with revenues meeting expectations. Positive outlook for Q4.

news.headline: Verisign reports Q3 2024 revenue of $391M (up 3.8% YoY) with operating income of $269M, per Business Wire.
news.summary: Reston, Virginia - VeriSign, Inc. (NASDAQ: VRSN), a leading global provider of vital internet infrastructure and domain name registry services, announced its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024. The operating income for the third quarter of 2024 stood at $269 million, a rise from $254 million reported in the same quarter of the previous year.

news.headline: Cambridge's tech industry growth highlights UK's income inequality issue.
L3Harris Technologies Q3 2024: Revenue at $5.3B, up 8%, EPS at $2.10, up 4%, Non-GAAP EPS at $3.34, up 5%. Book-to-bill ratio at 1.4x.
news.summary: L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) announced a positive financial performance in the third quarter of 2024, with a revenue of $5.3 billion, showing an 8% increase from the same period in 2023. The diluted EPS for the quarter stood at $2.10, marking a 4% increase from Q3 2023. Additionally, the non-GAAP diluted EPS for Q3 2024 reached $3.34, reflecting a 5% rise from the previous year. The company also reported a remarkable book-to-bill ratio of 1.4x. More information regarding non-GAAP results can be found in the tables starting from page 11.

news.headline: Skechers reports record-breaking quarterly sales of $2.35 billion in Q3 2024, with a 15.9% increase and diluted earnings per share up 35.5%.
news.summary: Skechers U.S.A., Inc. has reported financial results for the third quarter ended on September 30, 2024. The company, known as The Comfort Technology CompanyTM and a prominent global footwear leader, achieved record quarterly sales of $2.35 billion, marking a substantial 15.9% increase. Wholesale sales saw a growth of 20.6%, while Direct-to-Consumer sales increased by 9.6%. Diluted earnings per share also experienced a noteworthy surge, reaching $1.26, a 35.5% rise compared to the previous period. Additionally, Skechers repurchased $90.0 million of Class A common stock, showing confidence in their performance. The company expressed satisfaction with these results, indicating a strong performance in the market.

news.headline: TELA Bio closes $46M public offering of 14.67M common stock shares at $2.25/share, pre-funded warrants for 5.8M shares at $2.2499/share.
news.summary: TELA Bio, Inc., based in MALVERN, made an announcement on October 24, 2024, regarding the completion of its previously mentioned underwritten public offering. The offering consisted of 14,670,000 shares of common stock, with an inclusion of the underwriters’ full option to purchase additional shares. These shares were sold at a price of $2.25 per share to the public. In addition to common stock, pre-funded warrants were offered at a price of $2.2499 per warrant, giving investors the option to purchase 5,800,000 shares of common stock. The total gross proceeds from this offering amounted to $46 million prior to deducting underwriting discounts, commissions, and other estimated expenses, under the assumption that the pre-funded warrants are not exercised. It is important to note that all the shares of common stock and pre-funded warrants were sold by TELA.

news.headline: BeFra's Third Quarter 2024 results announced by Betterware de México, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (NYSE:BWMX), presented in Mexican Pesos.会

news.headline: Dow falls for 4th day, S&P 500 rises; Tesla stock surges.
